text: Walking these halls, I feel a sense of anticipation. The first space, bright and orderly, is like a threshold to possibilities—inviting, yet impersonal. Entering the exhibition, the bold declaration of 'R+D' wraps around me, pulling my thoughts toward progress and inquiry. The words on the screen invite reflection; I feel a blend of curiosity and comfort, tinged with the weight of intention behind every object and idea. This place makes me vividly aware of my own presence as both observer and participant in humanity’s ongoing experiment with growth and meaning.
